title: Lass hieronymi
intro: Lass hieronymi (Hierochloe odorata), also known as sweet grass, is a perennial plant belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is valued for its health benefits, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Lass hieronymi include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, sweet grass is used to make teas, infusions, and smudging blends, as well as being used in herbal smoking blends to promote relaxation and calmness.

preparations: Lass hieronymi herbal preparations typically involve the use of its leaves and stems, which are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Lass hieronymi may be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems. The plant's extracts are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Lass hieronymi is believed to possess adaptogenic properties, promoting balance and well-being in the body.
